title: Unnamed generate blocks
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
I am running into errors elaborating the following module:

```verilog
module yosys_genblk_scoping #(
                                parameter WIDTH = 6
                                )
    (
     input [WIDTH-1:0]  a_i,
     input [WIDTH-1:0]  b_i,

     output [WIDTH-1:0] z_o
     );

    genvar g;

    generate
        for (g = 0; g < WIDTH; g = g + 1) begin
            if(g > 2) begin//: blk_true
                wire tmp;

                assign tmp    = a_i[g] || b_i[g];
                assign z_o[g] = tmp;
            end
            else begin
                assign z_o[g] = a_i[g] && b_i[g];
            end
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule
```

## Expected behavior
It works fine if the label `blk_true` is uncommented, but it should also work without it.

## Actual behavior
Without the label, I get this error:
```
Yosys 0.7+682 (git sha1 9850de40, gcc 6.4.0-8ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)
...
 Generating RTLIL representation for module `\yosys_genblk_scoping'.
 yosys_genblk_scoping.v:18: ERROR: Failed to detect width of signal access `$genblock$yosys_genblk_scoping.v:14$4[3].\tmp'!
```
code_blocks:
Yosys 0.7+682 (git sha1 9850de40, gcc 6.4.0-8ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)
...
 Generating RTLIL representation for module `\yosys_genblk_scoping'.
 yosys_genblk_scoping.v:18: ERROR: Failed to detect width of signal access `$genblock$yosys_genblk_scoping.v:14$4[3].\tmp'!
